data.name: SendEventRegistrationRemindersCommand
data.description: Send weekly reminders to users who have not registered for open events

data.description: Send reminders every 3 days to users whose registration has empty participant slots

data.description: Send reminders every 3 days to users who have not uploaded payment proof

data.description: Clean up completed events and append them to the User past_events history array
